description: Description: Smart One For Two: The Headset connect 2 mobile devices at the same time. Thoughtful Design: This lavalier headphone body can be clipped on clothes or collars, when not needed, take out the earbuds and press the rewind button, the earbuds retract, very user friendly design. Clip On Earbud: The Handsfree Earbuds Earphone with Collar clip and flexible pulling design is no kinking and no broken which is in convenient to clip the 1 headset under your collar and easy to carry. Long Battery Life: The headset has a built in 400mah polymer battery, you can fully charge it in 30min, play music for 50 hours or talk for 50 hours, and stand by for 360 days to meet your daily needs. Wide Compatibility: This headset is compatible with most bluetooths music players and can be used with almost any mobile phone. Suitable for business/driving/motorcycle/sports.
